summary: A-Designs refinement pass FULLY VERIFIED. Backend: 14/14 pytest PASS (leads CRUD, auth, admin, CSV export). Frontend: all refinement requirements met — fake metrics removed (+38%, 4.9 average, 38 projects, Lighthouse all absent), 4 credibility chips present (Halifax-Based Studio / Mobile-First Design / Conversion Focused / SEO Ready), Founder section renders with eyebrow 'Meet the founder' (uppercase via CSS), 'Hi, I'm Sharwen.', 'Halifax businesses', 'Halifax, NS', Process step titles match exactly (Free Consultation, Custom Website Concept, Design & Development, Launch, Support), Nav CTA shows 'Free Website Mockup', Hero primary CTA 'Get A Free Website Mockup' scrolls to #contact and prefills [data-testid='contact-subject'] to 'Free Website Mockup Request', Hero secondary CTA scrolls to #work, Pricing growth CTA prefills 'Inquiry: Growth package', FinalCTA contains 'Get A Free Website Mockup' + prefills subject, Demo gallery has 5 tabs each with 4 cards, Contact form empty-submit shows field-level validation errors and valid submission shows [data-testid='contact-success']. Admin login redirects to /admin and dashboard exposes stats / search / industry+status filters / export CSV / logout. Mobile audit at 414px: NO horizontal scroll (documentElement & body scrollWidth = clientWidth = 414), hero floating mockup hidden on small viewports, demo gallery laptop mockup renders without overlap.
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile horizontal-overflow fix (called out in iteration_1) is now in place — overflow-x:hidden at body/main keeps 414px viewport clean even though decorative aurora blur divs internally extend past 100vw (clipped by parent).

Contact subject prefill works for three event names: 'a-designs:prefill-mockup' (sets 'Free Website Mockup Request'), legacy 'a-designs:prefill-consult' (sets 'Free Consultation'), and generic 'a-designs:prefill' (Pricing). Logic is centralized in Contact.jsx — good DRY.

Founder.jsx 'Meet the founder' eyebrow uses `tracking-eyebrow` which applies text-transform:uppercase — innerText returns mixed-case but rendered uppercase. Functionally correct; just a heads-up if any future test asserts on textContent vs visible text.

All required data-testids present (hero-cta-consult, hero-cta-demo-gallery, nav-cta-consult, demo-tab-*, demo-card-*, pricing-cta-*, contact-input-*, contact-subject, contact-submit, contact-success, contact-error, admin-*). No missing testids blocking automation.
seed_data_creation: Pytest created TEST_-prefixed leads and cleaned them up via session-scoped fixture. UI Playwright run created one TEST_UI_* lead via contact form (visible in admin dashboard).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_a_designs_api.py is fully self-cleaning. All refinement requirements (fake metrics removal, Founder section, new Process titles, new CTAs + prefill subject 'Free Website Mockup Request', 5x4 demo gallery, mobile no-overflow) are verified PASS. Contact form uses shadcn Select for industry — open trigger then click [role='option']:has-text('Restaurant / Cafe'). Subject prefill testid is 'contact-subject' (per-instance) while form input testids follow HOME constants 'contact-input-*'.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no failures. Mobile horizontal-overflow issue from iteration_1 is resolved (body scrollWidth = innerWidth = 414 at 414px viewport).
